calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Set For Trial On Oct-26-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 606

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Frederick George Craw, Esq. for Appellant/Defendant Tracey Pettigrew, who is also present.
Warren Foster, Respondent/Plaintiff

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Warren Foster, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his behalf. Counsel F. Craw examines Mr. Foster.

Tracey Pettigrew, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on her behalf. Direct examination by counsel F. Chew commences. Cross-examination by Mr. Foster commences.

Matter is taken under submission. No exhibits are identified or admitted.

Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk M. Pena; Not Reported (606).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Continued To Oct-26-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
